_meta.source: src_docx/Customer_Facing_Quote_Sheet.docx (Customer: Ms. Rajkumari Kamboj reference quote)
_meta.schema: no-tier; catalog as template/dictionary; rate, description, brands all set per quote via row overrides

items.label: Architectural Layout
items.description:
2D Architectural Design
Modern 3D Elevation / Façade Design Structural Design and Drawings
All construction work to be carried out as per approved plan

items.label: Structural Design & Seismic Compliance
items.description: Structure shall be designed as per IS 456, IS 1893, and IS 13920 for seismic Zone IV, with ductile detailing for safety.

items.label: Steel
items.description:
Rathi Steel 500FE  @4.5Kg per sqft
Any variation above and below 4.5kg is charged and refunded on pro rata basis.

items.label: Cement
items.description:
Ultratech / ACC
Same brand shall be used for all RCC, brickwork, and plastering works.

items.label: Bricks
items.description:
A Class Red Bricks
External walls shall be constructed using 9-inch thick brickwork and internal partition walls shall be 4.5-inch thick

items.label: Plinth, Floor and Stilt Level
items.description:
Plinth is considered at  1ft 6 inches to 2 ft height.
Floor to Ceiling Height (Clear Height) is 10 ft
Stilt height as per the government norms

items.label: Aggregates (Rodi)
items.description:
20mm & 10mm
Most superior bluish color aggregates to be used in all concrete work.

items.label: PCC in Foundation / Stilt and Terrace
items.description:
100mm (4 inch)  thick PCC in ratio of 1:3:6 (Cement:Sand:Aggregate)
PCC to be done below the foundation jal, in stilt area below the granite work and also in terrace below the terrace tile flooring

items.label: Plaster Work
items.description:
Interior Plaster : 8-10mm thick with ratio of 1:2:3 (Cement:Coarse Sand:Fine Sand)
Single coat plaster of 8-10mm thick would be provided.
Exterior Plaster : 12-15mm thick with ratio of 1:2:2 (Cement:Coarse sand:Fine Sand)
Double coat plaster totalling to 12-15 mm would be provided for durability and strength

items.label: Compound Wall
items.description: 9 Inch thick compound wall will be provided with 6 ft height from the plinth level on open areas perimeter

items.label: Parapet Wall
items.description: 9 inch thick wall with 3.3 ft will be provided on terrace on entire terrace perimeter.

items.label: Curing
items.description:
Sika Antisol
All RCC and masonry works shall be properly cured using continuous water curing methods to maintain adequate moisture for hydration of cement.
Minimum 12-14 days for RCC work, minimum 10-14  days for brickwork and plaster twice a day
Columns will be covered with jute bag during curing to retain water

items.label: Waterproofing
items.description:
Sika/Dr. Fixit LW+ (pidilite)
Concrete used anywhere is infused with waterproofing crystalline compound
Waterproofing coat is done in wet areas like balcony, bathrooms, underground sump
Gola is created on terrace on joint of slab and parapat wall
Waterproofing compound is is added to external plaster

items.label: Anti-Termite Treatment
items.description:
Bayer / Terminator (pidilite)
Termite soil treatment begins pre-construction for complete building.
To be done at plinth level with Bayer & Terminator (Pidilite) anti-termite chemical
Systematic piping network for uniform distribution across the area. Designed for efficiency, durability, and leak-proof performance.

items.label: Misc
items.description:
Chicken mesh to be used in all joints of brickwork and columns and conduct areas to prevent crack
Coverblock of appropriate thickness would be used

items.label: Assumptions
items.description:
Site level should not be less than 1 ft below the road level
Foundation is considered combination of isolated and combined footing 5 ft below the natural ground level

items.label: Sanitary Ware and CP Fitting
items.description:
35,000 per Bathroom
Premium quality sanitary ware including wall-mounted EWC, wash basin, shower head, and diverter from Jaquar / Hindware (Italian Collection) will be provided upto the specified value.

items.label: Shower Partition/Cubicles
items.description: Elegant shower partition made of 6–8 mm toughened glass, ensuring durability and modern aesthetics.

items.label: Bathroom Accessories
items.description: Standard accessories including mirror, towel rod/ring, soap dish, etc., up to the specified value.

items.label: Bathroom Geyser
items.description: One geyser per bathroom from reputed brands like Crompton / Bajaj, within the defined budget.

items.label: Exhaust Fan
items.description: Provision and installation of a wall-mounted exhaust fan (Havells make) for proper ventilation.

items.label: Bathroom Flooring
items.description:
50/- per sq ft
Anti-skid floor tiles (sizes: 1’×1’ or 2’×2’) to ensure safety and durability.

items.label: Bathroom Wall Cladding
items.description: Wall tiling up to ceiling height (sizes: 1’×1.5’ or 2’×2’)providing a clean and moisture-resistant finish.

items.label: CPVC Fittings
items.description:
Astral or Supreme
Complete plumbing system using high-quality CPVC pipes and fittings from trusted brands to ensure longevity and leak-proof performance.

items.label: Granite work
items.description: Granite finishing will be provided on top of the concealed wall-mounted flush tank (EWC) and as a counter slab for the wash basin.

items.label: Kitchen Wall Cladding (Visible Areas)
items.description: Ceramic wall tiles shall be provided in all visible areas up to a height of 5 ft above the kitchen countertop.

items.label: Kitchen Wall Cladding (Non Visible Areas)
items.description: Commercial / Waste tiles shall be provided behind kitchen cabinets (non-visible areas) to protect the cabinets from moisture.

items.label: Kitchen Counter Granite
items.description: Jet black polished granite (16–18 mm thick) shall be provided for the kitchen counter with double-layered nosing, mounted on a 4-inch RCC slab.

items.label: Sink and Faucet
items.description: Double-bowl stainless steel sink with faucet shall be provided within the specified budget.

items.label: Kitchen Geyser
items.description: One geyser per bathroom from reputed ISI mark brands like Crompton / Bajaj, within the defined budget.

items.label: Exhaust Fan
items.description: Provision and installation of a wall-mounted exhaust fan (Havells make) for proper ventilation.

items.label: CPVC Fittings
items.description:
Astral or Supreme
Complete plumbing system using high-quality CPVC pipes and fittings from trusted brands to ensure longevity and leak-proof performance.

items.label: Modular Kitchen
items.description: Modular kitchen made of HDHMR with premium laminates, including soft close channels from ozone brand, with well-designed drawers and corner solutions.

items.label: Hob and Chimney
items.description: Built-in hob and chimney from Faber / KAFF shall be provided within the specified budget range.

items.label: Misc
items.description:
Provision for water purifier, dishwasher, and other kitchen appliances shall be provided, including necessary inlet and outlet plumbing points.
A bib cock shall be provided for the washing machine in the utility area or at a location as per the architectural drawings.

items.label: Main Entry Door
items.description: 44 mm thick premium teak wood / flush door shutter with polished/laminated finish, fixed on a seasoned hardwood frame (teak/sal wood), complete with SS 304 hinges, SS tower bolts , door stopper, handle, and all necessary fittings and hardware..

items.label: Main Door Lock
items.description: Premium quality door locks from Godrej / Ozone / Yale  make shall be provided, suitable for the main door ensuring durability, safety, and smooth operation.

items.label: Internal and Bathroom Doors
items.description: Flush door shutters (Sumai or equivalent) with laminate/paint finish, installed on hardwood frames, complete with SS 304 hinges, SS tower bolts (where applicable), door stopper, handle, and all required fittings and hardware.

items.label: Internal and Bathroom Door Lock
items.description: Premium quality door locks from Godrej / Ozone / Yale or equivalent make shall be provided, suitable for internal and bathroom doors, ensuring durability, safety, and smooth operation.

items.label: Terrace Door
items.description: Mild steel (MS) door with primer and paint finish, including necessary fittings and locking arrangement.

items.label: Sliding Door/ Windows
items.description: UPVC sliding doors/windows with 3-track system (2 glass panels and 1 mosquito mesh track) from Prominence / EITI or equivalent make, complete with all necessary fittings and hardware.

items.label: Door Hinges & Stopper
items.description: 4 Stainless Steel 304 hinges for each door

items.label: Door Height
items.description: 7'6" to 8' as per approved plan

items.label: Tower Bolt
items.description: 18-24 inch, SS/Brass Finish

items.label: Modular/ WalkIn Wardrobe
items.description:
Factory-finished modular / walk-in wardrobe constructed using HDHMR board for carcass and shutters. All panels shall be edge-banded with PVC edge band for durability and moisture resistance.
External finish shall be in laminate finish only. Internal surfaces shall be finished in laminate / pre-laminated boards.
Hardware shall include soft-close hinges and telescopic drawer channels from reputed brands such as Godrej/Ozone or equivalent. Handles shall be standard SS / aluminium.
The wardrobe shall include basic internal layout comprising shelves, hanging rods, and 2 drawer units, designed for functional storage.
Lofts, fluted glass, acrylic/PU finish, premium accessories, and specialized fittings shall not be part of this scope.

items.label: Floor Flooring
items.description: Large-format vitrified tiles (2’×4’) in living, dining, kitchen and all bedrooms, with cementitious grouting.

items.label: Balcony Flooring
items.description: Anti-skid tiles (2’×2’) for balconies, with cementitious grouting.

items.label: Staircase Flooring
items.description: 18mm Granite shall be provided on treads and risers, with proper edge nosing and chamfering

items.label: Terrace Flooring
items.description: Anti-skid cool roof top tiles (2’×2’) for terrace, with cementitious grouting.

items.label: Stilt Flooring
items.description: 18mm Granite on treads and risers, with proper nosing and chamfering

items.label: Lift Façade
items.description:
Tiles/Granite
Lift façade cladding shall be finished with tiles or granite, as per design.

items.label: Skirting
items.description: 100 mm (4”) high skirting shall be provided along all wall edges in respective areas, matching the flooring material (vitrified tiles / granite). Skirting shall also be provided along staircase walls using matching granite, with proper edge finishing

items.label: Electrical Wire
items.description:
FR grade Finolex/Polycab Wires
FR grade copper wiring shall be provided with appropriate sizing for light, power, and AC circuits to ensure safe load handling.

items.label: Electrical Wire Specification
items.description: 10 sq. mm for main panels, 4 sq. mm for power and AC circuits, and 1.5 sq. mm for lighting circuits, ensuring safe load distribution without overloading.

items.label: Conduit Pipes & Boxes
items.description:
Astral / AKG
ISI marked PVC conduits shall be provided, with heavy-duty conduits in slabs and medium-duty conduits in walls, with separate routing for light and power circuits.

items.label: Switch & Sockets
items.description:
Havells/Anchor
Modular switches and sockets in white finish from Havells / Anchor equivalent make shall be provided. No. of switches and sockets will not be a constrain

items.label: Ceiling Fans
items.description: Ceiling fans from Havells or equivalent make shall be provided.

items.label: Split AC Provision
items.description:
One provision each in all bedrooms, drawing room, and living/kitchen area
Copper piping (average up to 10 m per AC) along with necessary electrical wiring shall be provided. Outdoor units shall be placed on the respective floor.

items.label: Downlighters
items.description: Downlighters from Philips / Osram or equivalent make shall be provided.

items.label: Cove Strip Lights
items.description: LED strip lights from Philips / Osram or equivalent make shall be provided in cove areas

items.label: Pillar Fancy Light
items.description:
Rs. 2,000/- per piller
Decorative pillar lights shall be provided for external areas. Maximum upto 4 pillers

items.label: UPS Wiring
items.description: Provision for UPS wiring shall be provided for each floor.

items.label: EV Charging Point
items.description: Provision for one electric vehicle charging point shall be provided per floor.

items.label: Solar Electrical Provision
items.description: Provision for solar electrical system shall be included.

items.label: MCB/ELCB
items.description: MCB and ELCB protection shall be provided for each floor.

items.label: Earthing
items.description: Earthing shall be done using copper strip earthing for effective grounding and safety.

items.label: Underground Water Tank
items.description:
2000 liters per floor
RCC underground sump shall be constructed for each floor as a separate unit, finished internally with commercial tiles. Waterproofing shall be carried out using approved systems from Dr. Fixit / Sika or equivalent.

items.label: Overhead Water Tank
items.description:
1000 liters per floor, 500 liters for Stilt
Triple-layer overhead water tanks of 1,000 litres capacity shall be provided for each floor, with an additional 500 litres tank for the stilt level. Tanks shall be from Astral or equivalent make.

items.label: Water Motor
items.description:
Crompton Greaves motor for each floor
1.5 HP water pump shall be provided for each floor, connecting individual underground sump to corresponding overhead tank. Pumps shall be from Crompton Greaves or equivalent make.

items.label: Rainwater Harvesting
items.description: Rainwater harvesting pit shall be constructed as per applicable government norms

items.label: Discharge PVC Pipe
items.description: All necessary PVC discharge pipes and connections shall be provided for proper water flow, drainage, and system integration. High-grade PVC pipes of 4-inch or 6-inch diameter, as per site conditions and design requirements, shall be used.

items.label: False Ceiling
items.description: POP cove false ceiling shall be provided in living, dining, and all bedrooms using Sakarni POP or equivalent make, including base level ceiling. Any additional design elements or premium features shall be as per design.

items.label: Elevation
items.description: Back side of the building shall be finished with chapai dana and roller finish.

items.label: CCTV Camera
items.description:
Rs. 50,000/- (CP Plus or equivalent)
CCTV camera system from CP Plus or equivalent make shall be provided, including necessary cameras, and basic wiring upto specified budget.

items.label: Video Door Phone
items.description:
Rs. 50,000/- (CP Plus, Alba or equivalent)
Video door phone system from CP Plus / Alba or equivalent make shall be provided with indoor monitor for each floor and entrance panel control.

items.label: Internal Wall Paint
items.description: Apcolite Premium Emulsion by Asian Paints

items.label: Exterior Wall Paint
items.description: Weathercoat glow Berger

items.label: Ceiling Paint
items.description: Apcolite Premium Emulsion by Asian Paints

items.label: Putty
items.description: JK Birla Putty

items.label: Polish
items.description: Melamine Polish in Matte/Glossy Finish as per owner's choice

items.label: Main Gate
items.description: Bifold MS Main Gate upto INR 2,50,000/- (Includes Main Gate and Side Gate)

items.label: Staircase & Balcony Railing
items.description: Staircase Railing - MS Steel designer railing ; Balcony Railing as per design

items.label: Concrete Mixing
items.description: Done with concrete mixers. On Site mixing for Columns (M-25) i.e. (1:1:2)

items.label: Vibrators
items.description: Used to consolidate layers in footings, columns, beams & roof slabs

items.label: Brickwork Mortar
items.description: 9" brickwork not leaner than 1:6; 4½" brickwork not leaner than 1:4

items.label: Soil Test
items.description: Soil Test to be done before construction

items.label: Lift Machine
items.description:
All Civil, Electrical, Paint, Polish, Exhausting, Earthing Work for lift will be done
Entry for all floors will be well designed with stone panelling
Lift Machine – Schindler/Kone equivalent
The cost of lift machine is capped at INR 10 Lacs
